channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jackie Stoloff: Iconic Model and Muse of 1950s Fashion
item.description: Jacqueline “Jackie” Stoloff was one of the most influential models of the late 1940s and early 1950s, representing the elegant transition from post-war fashion to the youthful, dynamic styles of the e...

item.title: South Africa Donates $2.5 Million to Support Ebola Response in DRC and Uganda
item.description: The South African government has pledged US$2.5 million through the Africa CDC Africa Epidemics Fund to assist the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda in responding to the ongoing Ebola outbre...

item.title: Tanzania and Russia Strengthen Cooperation in Industry, Energy, and Transport Infrastructure
item.description: Tanzania and Russia don sign new agreements to deepen their economic cooperation across industry, energy, transport infrastructure, and air transport. This came during the Tanzania–Russia Business and...

item.title: Five Militants, Including Wanted Terror Leader, Killed in North Waziristan Security Operation
item.description: In a significant counter-terrorism operation in Spinwam, North Waziristan, security forces successfully neutralised five militants, including Kharji Umar, also known as Jan Mir or Tor Saqib, who was a...

item.title: South Australian man facing court over alleged home invasion and sexual assault
item.description: A man accused of committing rape during a break-in at a South Australian home has been publicly identified in court. The court proceedings revealed the identity of the accused, who is now facing charg...

item.title: Newfoundland Bars Filled with Fans Cheering Hometown Star Alex Newhook in Canadiens Playoff Wins

item.description: Laika, the renowned stop-motion animation studio, returns with its newest film, 'Wildwood,' marking seven years since their last feature, 'The Missing Link.' Known for creating intricately crafted, ta...

item.title: Lindeka Qampi Empowers Children to Tell Their Stories Through Photography
item.description: Lindeka Qampi, a celebrated South African photographer and cultural storyteller, has dedicated her life to using photography as a tool for social change and personal empowerment. Born in Bolotwa, East...

item.title: Presidential Aide Explains Legal Right to Self-Defence and Community Security in Nigeria
item.description: For those wey dey worry about insecurity, presidential aide Daniel Bwala don yan say Nigerians fit defend themselves if dem dey under immediate threat, but e no mean say everybody fit carry gun anyhow...

item.title: George-Kelly Withdraws from Rivers APC Governorship Primaries to Support Party Unity
item.description: One more governorship aspirant for All Progressives Congress (APC) for Rivers State, Dr George-Kelly, don officially withdraw from di party primary election. Di move na to maintain unity for di party ...

item.title: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome Renamed to PMOS After Global Consultation
item.description: After over a decade of international consultation, the condition previously known as polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) has officially been renamed polyendocrine metabolic ovarian syndrome (PMOS). Affec...

item.title: WMA Advocates for Standardised Public Measurements Across Tanzania

item.title: Australian Court Confirms Fine on Elon Musk’s X for Failing Child Safety Rules
item.description: On Thursday, an Australian federal court don uphold fine of AU$650,000 (around US$465,000) against Elon Musk’s social media company, X. The matter concern how the company no follow Australian child in...

item.title: How Switching to a Custom Payment Gateway Boosted Our E-Commerce Success

item.title: HONOR 600 Series Launches in the Philippines with Advanced AI Features
